body: This PR upgrades the `neverworld_simulation` to use `PartialCellBottom`.
title: PartialCellNeverworld

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Oceananigans` package from `0.80` to `0.80, 0.81`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Oceananigans to 0.81, (keep existing compat)
